title: Configurable Splash Texts
body:
THIS MOD IS DEPRECATED, PLEASE VISIT THE NEW MOD [HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/configurable-everything)


Provides a config file for modifying the in-game splash texts.

 

This mod is fully compatible with resource packs that change splash texts.

 

This mod allows you to:

 

- Add new splash texts

- Remove specific splash texts

- Change splash text color

- Remove all vanilla splash texts
 

This mod may be useful for modpacks that want to modify splash texts without overriding the splash file with a resourcepack.
